mapper.insert: insert into course_evaluation (student_id, student_name, course_id, course_name, teacher_id, rating, content, teacher_evaluation, evaluation_time) values (#{studentId}, #{studentName}, #{courseId}, #{courseName}, #{teacherId}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{teacherEvaluation}, #{evaluationTime})
mapper.select: select * from course_evaluation order by evaluation_time desc
select * from course_evaluation where student_id = #{studentId} and course_id = #{courseId}
